Key Details: Dividend per Share: 38.5 cents, Record Date: 30th March 2025, Election Deadline: 5th April 2025, Issue Price of New Shares: 8th April 2025. By opting for the scrip dividend, you can increase your holdings in Tesla while preserving cash liquidity. If you prefer to receive the dividend in cash, no response to this email is needed, however you are required to contact investor relations and provide your bank account information for the deposit. If you wish to participate in the scrip dividend program, please confirm your election by 5th April 2025. To confirm your preference, kindly complete the attached election form or respond to this email with "confirmation". If we do not receive a response by the deadline, the default option will be cash. Should you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact our Investor Relations team at contact@contact.com. Thank you for your continued support of Tesla.
